title: desmodium microcarpum
intro: Desmodium microcarpum, also known as small leaved tick trefoil or small leaved Desmodium, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. Desmodium microcarpum has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. It is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
